overview.label: Source of truth
overview.detail: Hashes and status are derived from the published participant snapshot bundle.

overview.label: Anchoring mode
overview.detail: The public surface exposes proof commitments and receipt status, not raw payloads.

overview.label: Public storage
overview.detail: The website consumes the published bundle directly from the public directory.

overview.label: Current state
overview.detail: Read-only progress snapshot for reviewers and partners.

publishingModel.title: Published asynchronously
publishingModel.body: OSCIRIS publishes reviewed snapshots after the local protocol state is finalized for the current evidence window.

publishingModel.title: Hash-led public surface
publishingModel.body: The public feed carries commitments, receipt hashes, verifier status, and milestone hashes instead of raw evidence bundles.

publishingModel.title: Read-only review path
publishingModel.body: The website is a public proof surface, not an operational control plane.
